# clearpass_network_device_groups (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of ClearPass network device groups, optionally filtered.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch all network device groups
data "clearpass_network_device_groups" "all" {
}

output "all_device_groups" {
  value = data.clearpass_network_device_groups.all.network_device_groups
}

# Fetch network device groups using a JSON filter
data "clearpass_network_device_groups" "filtered" {
  filter = "{\"name\":{\"$contains\":\"Switches\"}}"
}

output "switches_groups" {
  value = data.clearpass_network_device_groups.filtered.network_device_groups
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `calculate_count` (Boolean) Whether to calculate the total item count.
- `filter` (String) JSON filter expression specifying the items to return.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of items to return.
- `offset` (Number) Zero based offset to start from.
- `sort` (String) Sort ordering for returned items.

### Read-Only

- `network_device_groups` (Attributes List) List of network device groups matching the query. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_device_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--network_device_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_device_groups`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the network device group.
- `group_format` (String) Format of the network devices in this group.
- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the network device group.
- `name` (String) Name of the network device group.
- `value` (String) Network devices in the specified format.
